01.title: Web Offset
01.body: 22 high-capacity web offset towers engineered for large-volume education and commercial printing. Capable of producing millions of printed forms every day, delivering exceptional speed, consistency, and colour accuracy. Multiple cut-off configurations provide flexibility for textbooks, trade books, workbooks, newspapers, and other publications.
01.caption: Web Towers, Press Hall
highlights: millions of printed forms every day
01.intro: 22 web offset printing towers with a range of cut-off configurations, equipped to manufacture books in multiple trim sizes with maximum efficiency and minimal paper wastage.

points.title: 22 Printing Towers
points.desc: Twenty-two web offset printing towers.

points.title: Cut-off Configurations
points.desc: A range of cut-off configurations.

points.title: Multiple Trim Sizes
points.desc: Books manufactured in multiple trim sizes.

points.title: Minimal Wastage
points.desc: Maximum efficiency with minimal paper wastage.

02.title: Sheet Fed
02.body: 6 state-of-the-art sheetfed presses: 1 × Eight-colour perfecting press, 5 × Four-colour presses. Featuring premium technology from Komori and Ryobi, enabling outstanding print quality for covers, coffee table books, children's books, packaging, diaries, annual reports, and premium commercial printing.
02.caption: Sheet-Fed Presses, Taloja
02.intro: Six brand-new sheet-fed offset presses from Komori and Ryobi, including the latest 8-colour Komori GL-837P Advance Perfector, built to deliver exceptional print quality.

points.title: 6 Komori & Ryobi Presses
points.desc: Six brand-new sheet-fed offset presses.

points.title: 8-Colour Perfector
points.desc: The latest 8-colour Komori GL-837P Advance Perfector.

points.title: Covers & Short Runs
points.desc: Book covers, premium commercial and short-run production.

points.title: Colour Accuracy
points.desc: Outstanding colour accuracy, sharp detail and flexibility.

03.title: Binding and Finishing
03.body: An integrated post-press line built for speed, durability and precision, with perfect binding, saddle stitching, section sewing and case making, binding millions of high-quality books every year.
03.caption: Binding Line, Navi Mumbai
highlights: perfect binding, saddle stitching, section sewing and case making
millions of high-quality books every year
03.intro: A fully integrated binding and finishing division equipped to handle a wide range of book formats with speed and precision.

points.title: Perfect Binding
points.desc: 3 Bindwel lines and 7 six-clamp perfect binding machines.

points.title: Saddle Stitching
points.desc: 3 Müller Martini saddle stitching (centre pinning) lines.

points.title: Section Sewing
points.desc: 8 automatic section sewing machines and 17 manual stations.

points.title: Hardcover Production
points.desc: HXCP book block line, Kolbus DA 260 case maker and case-in line.

intro.heading: Infrastructure
intro.subtitle: Built to deliver quality at scale
intro.para1: Strategically located near JNPT (Jawaharlal Nehru Port), Navi Mumbai, Quarterfold Printabilities operates three integrated manufacturing facilities and one dedicated warehousing and fulfilment centre, spanning over 300,000 sq. ft.
intro.para2: Our manufacturing platform is designed to produce a wide range of products, including educational books, trade books, children's books, board books, softcover and hardcover publications, supported by advanced pre-press, printing, binding, finishing, warehousing, and global dispatch capabilities.
intro.rightHeading: As of July 2026, our infrastructure includes:

list.title: Automated Case Maker, Case-In & Book Block Lines
Comprehensive Finishing Department
list.sub: featuring lamination, Spot UV, embossing, foil stamping, die-cutting and specialty finishing

intro.closing: Combined with our strategic port location, integrated warehousing, and experienced team, this infrastructure enables us to deliver high-quality books efficiently and reliably to publishers and educational institutions across more than 25 countries.

04.title: Warehouse
04.body: Our modern warehousing and logistics infrastructure supports efficient inventory management and global distribution: High-capacity storage for paper, finished goods, and customer inventory. Secure stock management. Order consolidation and kitting. Export-ready packing. Efficient dispatch and last-mile distribution coordination.
04.intro: An integrated warehousing and fulfilment centre offering comprehensive book kitting, inventory management, storage, order fulfilment and last-mile delivery.

points.title: Kitting & Assembly
points.desc: Book kitting and educational kit assembly.

points.title: Inventory & Storage
points.desc: Inventory management and secure storage.

points.title: Order Fulfilment
points.desc: Order fulfilment and last-mile delivery services.

points.title: Built for Scale
points.desc: Supporting publishers, institutions and large-scale distribution.

05.title: Corporate Headquarters
05.body: Our corporate headquarters brings together leadership, customer service, design, finance, procurement, and project management under one roof in the heart of the city of Navi Mumbai. 200+ professionals. Contemporary collaborative workspaces. Dedicated client meeting rooms. In-house café and employee collaboration areas. Technology-enabled offices supporting seamless communication with customers across the globe.
05.intro: Located in the heart of Navi Mumbai, our 15,000 sq. ft. corporate headquarters is the central hub for customer support, strategic planning, finance, design, and business operations.

points.title: In-House Design & Pre-Press
points.desc: Dedicated teams for last-minute artwork updates.

points.title: Customer Support
points.desc: Experienced customer service professionals.

points.title: Collaborative Leadership
points.desc: A collaborative leadership team.

points.title: Central Operations Hub
points.desc: Support, planning, finance, design and operations under one roof.

binding.title: Binding and Finishing
binding.body: Collating, shrink wrapping, perfect binding, centre pinning, flexi binding and section sewing, across 6 automatic thread sewing machines.

lamination.title: Lamination and Embellishment
lamination.body: Drip lamination, various lamination, embossing and gold foiling.

video.previewAria: Preview facilities walkthrough, video coming soon

people.title: Hands Behind Every Shipment
people.body: Press operators, quality inspectors, kitting teams and logistics specialists, working across shifts, trained to the same standard at every facility.
